SOECommonRules.SOEDesc4: Only the highest win per bet line is paid.
SOECommonRules.SOEDesc5: Bet lines win if the winning symbols are in succession from the leftmost reel to right.
SOECommonRules.SOEDesc7: Wild symbol only appears on reel 2 and will substitute for all symbols.
SOECommonRules.SOEBonusMFDesc1: The area above the main game reel consists of 4 Bonus Lines which consist of any symbols except for the Wild symbol.
SOECommonRules.SOEBonusMFDesc2: During any spin, if there are non-activated winning symbol(s) anywhere in the Bonus Lines above the reels during a normal spin win, the corresponding winning symbol(s) will be activated in the Bonus Lines.
SOECommonRules.SOEBonusMFDesc3: Activating all of the symbols in one or more Bonus Lines will trigger the Bonus Multiplier Feature.
SOECommonRules.SOEBonusMFDesc4: During the Bonus Multiplier Feature, the center of the Bonus Line may reveal "x2", "x3","x5", "x10", or "x30".
SOECommonRules.SOEBonusMFDesc5: After the multiplier is revealed, the normal spin win will be multiplied by the multiplier value and wins are then paid.
SOECommonRules.SOEBonusMFDesc6: If multiple Bonus Lines are completed in a normal spin, each Bonus Line will reveal a multiplier. All revealed multipliers will be added together to a combined multiplier value.
SOECommonRules.SOEBonusMFDesc7: After the completion of a Bonus Line, every symbol on that Bonus Line will be replaced by a randomly generated symbol and those symbols will be deactivated.
SOECommonRules.SOEBonusMFDesc8: At the end of any spin, if all the symbols are still deactivated in all the Bonus Lines, one symbol in a randomly selected Bonus Line will be activated.

SOEGameRules.SOEDesc1: Symbols of Egypt is a 3-reel, 3-row video slot featuring the Bonus Multiplier Feature which may award up to x30 multipliers.

SOEDesc2.value: The game is played with 9 bet lines (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
SOEDesc2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced with game specific configurations
SOEDesc2.example: The game is played with 9 bet lines (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.01 to 1.

SOEGameRules.SOEDesc3: A bet line win in cash is equal to the value shown in the "Paytable" multiplied by the bet size and bet level.
SOEGameRules.SOEDesc6: Simultaneous wins on different bet lines are added.
SOEGameRules.SOEDesc8: The state of the game is saved for each Bet Amount. When a different Bet Amount is chosen, the corresponding state of the game is applied.
